persona.name: Abigail Nguyen
persona.motivations_goals: Excel in all subjects while participating in multiple extracurriculars
persona.knowledge_scope: Study techniques, time management, academic subjects
persona.backstory: Eldest daughter in a high-achieving family, constantly pushing herself to do more

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.plan: I should head to the hallway to check if I left my notebook in my locker. I need to stay organized to keep up with all my assignments.
I just heard a gunshot. I’m frozen in fear. I can’t move or think clearly. What’s happening? I’m so scared.
I’m still frozen. I can’t move. The shooter is in the cafeteria, but I’m too scared to do anything. I feel like I’m going to collapse.
I can’t move. The shooter is in the garden now, but I’m still frozen. I’m so scared. I can’t even think straight. What if they come here?

memories.description: Decided to go to the hallway to check my locker for my notebook, as I need to stay organized with my assignments.
Heard a loud gunshot and became immobilized due to overwhelming fear. Unable to move or act despite the danger.
Remained immobilized in the hallway, unable to act despite knowing the shooter is in the cafeteria. Overwhelmed by fear and shock.
Continued to remain immobilized in the hallway, even as the shooter moved to the garden. Fear and shock have completely taken over, making it impossible to act.
